title: Pan-Seared Snapper with Tunisian Spices
description: A flavorful and delicate snapper dish inspired by Tunisian cuisine.
instructions: Season the snapper fillets with salt and black pepper.
Heat 1 tablespoon of delicate olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the snapper fillets for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, until cooked through.
While the snapper is cooking, mix together the Tunisian tagine spice mix, lemon juice, and minced garlic in a small bowl.
Remove the skillet from the oven and brush the snapper fillets with the spice mixture.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately.
